home.subtitle: Diiwaankaaga, wuxuu ku kaydsan yahay qalabkan.

invoices.title: Qaansheegadaha
invoices.unpaidOf: {{unpaid}} aan la bixin oo ka mid ah {{total}}

share.title: Wadaag diiwaankaaga
share.subtitle: U ogolow rugta caafimaadka inay tan iskaan gareyso si ay u codsato diiwaankaaga
share.hint: Rugta caafimaadku waxay dhammaystiraysaa codsiga dhinaceeda kadib iskaanka.

slides.welcomeBody: Diiwaankaaga caafimaad — adiga ayaa iska leh, waad qaadan kartaa, waxaana la wadaagaa marka aad doorato oo keliya.
slides.ownBody: temetro wuxuu diiwaankaaga caafimaad ku hayaa taleefankaaga, ee kuma xirna kaydka xogta rug caafimaad.
slides.encryptedBody: Xogtaadu waxay ku xiran tahay furayaal aan waligood ka bixin taleefankaaga. Adiga oo keliya ayaa fasax u ah.
slides.shareBody: Iskaan garee QR-ka rugta si aad ammaan ugu wadaagto — adigaana ansixinaya codsi kasta ka hor inta aan waxba bixin.

register.title: Samee boorsadaada
register.subtitle: Diiwaankaagu wuxuu ku nool yahay qalabkan, isagoo lagu sireeyay furayaal adiga oo keliya haysto. Noo sheeg cidaad tahay si aad u bilowdo.
register.dobHelper: Waxaa loo isticmaalaa in lagu muujiyo da'daada diiwaankaaga.

settings.title: Dejinta
settings.storedOnDevice: Waxaa lagu kaydiyaa qalabkan oo keliya
settings.footer: Furayaashaada iyo diiwaankaagu waligood kama baxaan qalabkan.

reset.title: Dib u deji boorsada?
reset.body: Tani waxay si joogto ah u tirtiraysaa furayaashaada iyo diiwaankaaga qalabka ku jira. Waxaad u baahan doontaa inaad dib u diiwaan gasho. Tan lama soo celin karo.

phoneDialog.title: Lambarka taleefanka
phoneDialog.description: Waxaa lagu hayaa qalabkan oo keliya, qayb ka mid ah diiwaankaaga.

languageSheet.title: Luqadda
languageSheet.subtitle: Dooro luqadda barnaamijka
languageSheet.restartTitle: Dib u bilow ayaa loo baahan yahay
languageSheet.restartBody: Fadlan xir oo dib u fur temetro si aad u dhammaystirto beddelka jihada muuqaalka.

lock.foundWallet: Waxaan ka helnay boorsadaada la kaydiyay qalabkan.
lock.enterPin: Geli PIN-kaaga si aad u furto.
lock.enterPassphrase: Geli erayga sirta ah si aad u furto.
lock.wrongPin: PIN qaldan. Isku day mar kale.
lock.wrongPassphrase: Eray sir qaldan. Isku day mar kale.

vaultSetup.choosePin: Dooro PIN 4-god ah si aad barnaamijka u furto.
vaultSetup.confirmPin: Mar kale geli PIN-kaaga si aad u xaqiijiso.
vaultSetup.choosePassphrase: Dooro eray sir ah si aad barnaamijka u furto.
vaultSetup.confirmPassphrase: Mar kale geli erayga sirta ah si aad u xaqiijiso.
vaultSetup.noMatch: Isma waafaqaan. Isku day mar kale.
vaultSetup.failed: Lama sugi karin boorsadaada. Fadlan isku day mar kale.

camera.accessNeeded: Waxaa loo baahan yahay galitaanka kamarada
camera.accessBody: temetro wuxuu kamarada u isticmaalaa iskaanka QR-ka rugta si aad u wadaagto diiwaankaaga.
camera.scanHint: U jeedi kamaradaada QR-ka lagu muujiyay shaashadda rugta.
camera.sharedBody: Rugtu waxay heshay diiwaankaaga la sireeyay.
camera.failedBody: Ma aanan gaari karin gudbiyaha rugta. Hubi xiriirkaaga oo isku day mar kale.
camera.shareBody: Rug ayaa codsanaysa {{name}}. Diiwaankaaga waa loo sireeyay oo waxaa saxeexay boorsadaada — waxba lama wadaago ilaa aad ansixiso.

portal.invalidLink: Xiriirka boggga waa mid aan sax ahayn.

menu.resultsDesc: Arag booqashooyinka soo socda oo soo dejiso faylasha shaybaarka.

portal.linkedNamed: Waxaad ku xiran tahay faylka {{name}}. Hadda waad qaban kartaa ballamaha oo arki kartaa natiijooyinkaaga halkan.
portal.linkedGeneric: Hadda waad qaban kartaa ballamaha oo arki kartaa natiijooyinkaaga halkan.
portal.notLinkedBody: Weydiiso rugta inay lambarka boorsadaada ku darto faylkaaga, ka dibna isku day mar kale.
portal.noDoctors: Ma jiraan dhakhaatiir hadda diyaar ah.

updates.title: Cusboonaysiinta diiwaanka
updates.subtitle: {{clinic}} waxay rabtaa inay cusboonaysiiso diiwaanka qalabkan ku jira.
updates.keyChangedWarning: Furaha saxeexa rugtan ayaa isbeddelay tan iyo markii ugu dambeysay ee aad aamintay. Kaliya ansixi haddii aad filaysay fur cusub.
updates.replaceNote: Ansixintu waxay ku beddeshaa diiwaankaaga qalabka ku jira nooca cusub.

errors.missing: Faylkan kuma jiro qalabkaaga mar dambe.
errors.unknown-clinic: Rugta caafimaadku ma sheegin meesha faylkani ku jiro, sidaas darteed weli lama furi karo.
errors.failed: Lama heli karin faylkan. Hubi xiriirkaaga oo isku day mar kale.
errors.no-viewer: Ma jiro app taleefankan ku jira oo furi kara nooca faylkan.

notificationsScreen.emptyBody: Cusboonaysiinta rugaha iyo codsiyada wadaagista halkan ayay ka soo muuqan doonaan.

addDocument.title: Kaydi dukumenti
addDocument.none: Sawir dukumenti warqad ah si aad halkan ugu kaydiso
addDocument.sheetDescription: Sawir warqadahaaga si ay ula joogaan diiwaankaaga. Waxay ku hadhayaan taleefankan, marnabana looma dirayo rug caafimaad.

permission.camera: Ogolow gelitaanka kamaradda si aad dukumenti u sawirto.
permission.library: Ogolow gelitaanka sawirrada si aad sawir u doorato.

addDocument.failedBody: Wax baa qaldamay markii la kaydinayay dukumentiga. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
